alerts.title: New cyber force would cost up to $11 billion to start, commission says
alerts.summary: The military branch would take 12 to 18 months to get up and running and also include roughly 5,000 members of the National Guard and up to 6,000 civilians, according to the commission.

alerts.title: Binance discloses revenue-sharing deal with Alpaca
